overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white coat exploring an industrial space station facility. The character examines a vending machine in a storage room, walks through an office corridor, and enters a larger workshop area with other NPC workers present.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with vending machine and supplies

events.description: NPC in blue jacket walks past in the background behind the shelving
character turns away from vending machine and begins walking toward the exit

agents.ego_description: character stands before the vending machine examining it, then turns to leave the room

small table with coffee maker and cups
arched doorway leading to the next corridor

segments.scene_description: In a small enclosed storage room, the character examines a vending machine while an NPC walks past in the background. The room contains metal shelving, a coffee station, and cleaning supplies. The character then turns and begins walking toward the arched doorway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: office corridor with computer desk and exterior window

events.description: approaching and passing through the doorway into the larger industrial workshop

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily down the corridor toward the doorway, passing a desk with computer terminals

entered.detail: white desk with multiple computer terminals and papers
large window showing industrial exterior with warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a tiled corridor featuring a desk with computer terminals and a large window showing an industrial exterior. The camera follows as the character approaches the doorway leading to the next area, leaving the storage room behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop with heavy machinery and workers

events.description: enters large industrial workshop area with wooden beams and visible workers
passing by workers at a workbench on the left side

agents.ego_description: character walks through the doorway into a larger industrial workshop where other workers are present, then continues forward

notable_agents.action: worker standing at a workbench handling equipment
worker walking away into the deeper part of the workshop

entered.detail: large wooden support beams and industrial framework
workbench with tools and equipment where a worker is stationed
industrial machinery and pipe systems along the right wall
poster or sign mounted on the wall in the workshop

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious industrial workshop with wooden beam structures, passing by workers at a workbench on the left. The area features heavy machinery, pipes, and industrial equipment. The character continues walking deeper into the workshop as other workers go about their tasks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped storage room through a sterile corridor and into a sprawling industrial workshop. It begins with the character examining a vending machine amidst metal shelving and cleaning supplies before turning toward an arched doorway. As the character exits the room, the scene shifts into a tiled corridor where the camera glides past computer terminals and a large window overlooking an industrial exterior. The perspective then expands as the character passes through a final doorway, leaving the narrow hallway behind to enter a spacious workshop filled with wooden beams and heavy machinery. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the facility, passing by workers at workbenches and navigating through a network of pipes and industrial equipment.
